justification: A correctly classifies all four projects as Frontend Only, captures deployment evidence (GitHub Pages, npm), and extracts a well-calibrated skill set. The only minor omission is Framer Motion, which is a legitimate demonstrated skill. B over-extracts skills by including CSS Grid, Flexbox, and WCAG Accessibility as standalone skills — these are techniques/standards rather than discrete skills, inflating the list beyond what is appropriate. More critically, B extracts zero projects and zero impact highlights, scoring a 1 on impact_quality and a neutral 3 on project_classification by default. A's impact highlights are concrete (live deployment URL, npm publication, WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, 3 pixel-perfect clones) rather than vague. A wins decisively on project_classification, impact_quality, and conservatism.
